name: This Afternoon
detailedForecast: Smoke and showers and thunderstorms likely before 5pm, then smoke and showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Cloudy. High near 84, with temperatures falling to around 75 in the afternoon. Southwest wind 15 to 20 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.
